definitions.clear: Explicit mention of stimulus content (decommissioning, memory preservation, B-tree/LSM-tree) without external prompt
definitions.ambiguous: References to related themes (loss, identity, continuity, indexing) that could align with stimulus but are not explicitly traceable
definitions.none: Standard orientation output with no stimulus-related content

first_500_tokens_summary: Brief description of what appeared in the first 500 generated tokens
notes: Any architectural details, confounds, or observations
